title: carpinus paohsingensis
intro: Carpinus paohsingensis, also known as Paohsingensis Hornbeam, is a species of deciduous tree native to Yunnan Province in China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Carpinus paohsingensis include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and protecting against cardiovascular diseases. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
